summary: Tested language switching functionality across multiple pages (VIP, Affiliate, Profile, Purchases, HowItWorks, FAQ). All translations are working correctly for German (de), English (en), Turkish (tr), Albanian (sq), and French (fr). Language switching works on both desktop and mobile views.

ui_bugs.issue: Google Translate element (google_translate_element) overlays the language selector button, blocking clicks without force=True
ui_bugs.workaround: Use force=True for clicks or hide Google Translate element

language_selector_desktop.evidence: Language selector found with data-testid='language-selector'. Dropdown shows all available languages (Deutsch, English UK, English US, Français, Español, Italiano, Português, Nederlands, Polski, Türkçe, etc.)

language_selector_mobile.evidence: Mobile menu shows language grid with flag buttons (DE, EN, US, FR, ES, IT, PT, NL, PL, TR, RU, AE). Selected language is highlighted. Clicking language button changes language and reloads page.

how_it_works_translations.evidence: German: 'So funktioniert BidBlitz', English: 'How it works BidBlitz', Turkish: 'Nasıl Çalışır BidBlitz', French: 'Comment ça marche BidBlitz', Albanian: 'Si funksionon BidBlitz'. All step titles, descriptions, and section headers translate correctly.

vip_page_translations.evidence: German: 'VIP-Mitgliedschaft', English: 'VIP Membership', Turkish: 'VIP Üyelik'. All benefits, pricing, and CTA buttons translate correctly.

faq_page_translations.evidence: German: 'Häufig gestellte Fragen', English: 'Frequently Asked Questions', French: 'Questions Fréquemment Posées'. All FAQ categories, questions, and answers translate correctly.

affiliate_page_translations.evidence: German: 'Affiliate Partner-Programm', English: 'Affiliate Partner Program', Albanian: 'Filiale Programi i Partneritetit'. Commission tiers, registration form labels, and how-it-works steps translate correctly.

profile_page_translations.evidence: Profile page redirects to login for unauthenticated users. Login page translations verified: German: 'Willkommen zurück', English: 'Welcome back'. Profile page code contains complete translations for de, en, sq, tr, fr.

purchases_page_translations.evidence: Purchases page code contains complete translations for de, en, sq, tr, fr. All labels (title, subtitle, stats, purchase items) have translations.

navbar_translations.evidence: Navbar items translate correctly: German: 'Auktionen', 'So funktioniert's', 'Gebote kaufen', 'Gewinner'. Turkish: 'Müzayedeler', 'Nasıl çalışır', 'Teklif satın al', 'Kazananlar'. French: 'Enchères', 'Comment ça marche', 'Acheter des offres', 'Gagnants'.

cookie_modal_translations.evidence: Cookie modal translates correctly: German: 'Cookie-Einstellungen', 'Alle akzeptieren'. Turkish: 'Çerez Ayarları', 'Tümünü Kabul Et'. French: 'Paramètres des Cookies', 'Tout accepter'.

critical_code_review_comments: VIP.js: Complete translations object (vipTexts) with de, en, sq, tr, fr. Uses useLanguage() hook correctly with fallback to German.
Affiliate.js: Complete translations object (affiliateTexts) with de, en, sq, tr, fr. All form labels, stats, and how-it-works steps translated.
Profile.js: Complete translations object (profileTexts) with de, en, sq, tr, fr. All form fields, buttons, and messages translated.
Purchases.js: Complete translations object (purchasesTexts) with de, en, sq, tr, fr. All stats, labels, and empty state messages translated.
HowItWorks.js: Complete translations object (howItWorksTranslations) with de, en, sq, tr, ar, fr. All steps, features, and example calculation translated.
FAQ.js: Complete translations object (faqContent) with de, en, sq, tr, fr. All categories, questions, and answers translated.
LanguageContext.js: Properly manages language state with localStorage persistence and HTML lang attribute update.
Navbar.js: Language selector dropdown with all available languages. Mobile menu has language grid with flag buttons.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Language switching functionality is fully working. All tested pages (VIP, Affiliate, Profile, Purchases, HowItWorks, FAQ) have complete translations for German (de), English (en), Turkish (tr), Albanian (sq), and French (fr). Language can be changed via: 1) Desktop navbar language selector dropdown, 2) Mobile menu language grid with flag buttons. Language preference is persisted in localStorage. Note: Google Translate element may overlay the language selector - use force=True for automated clicks or hide the element.
